chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-4075 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 13.11.2025 Mr. Khalid Javed, advocate for the respondent --------- Learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent. According to learned counsel for the respondent, NED University of Engineering and Technology, does not have statutory rules of service as such this petition is not maintainable under constitutional jurisdiction of this Court. This being the position of the case, the instant petition is dismissed as not maintainable. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
